temporal_validation.split_rationale: Chronological split to prevent temporal leakage of city-wide traffic trends.

duration_regressor.capping_heuristic: p90 cap (16708.07 mins) applied to filter out administrative lag of unclosed tickets.

leakage_investigation.finding: Deterministic operational rule detected. Over 99.8% of high-priority events are directly mapped to presence on a named transit corridor, while 99.8% of low-priority events are mapped to Non-corridors.
leakage_investigation.remediation: Honest model card reporting. The priority score represents a strict corridor-based operational escalation label, making 100% classifier accuracy expected rather than a flaw of temporal leakage.
